_description: Project data for תכנית 407-0977595. Rules use v2 taxonomy: numeric|geometric|document_presence|procedural|qualitative.
_updated: March 2026 — rule taxonomy updated, missing rules added | May 2026 — added design_plan + linked_statutory_plans for many-to-many design-plan ↔ statutory-plan model; per-parcel governing_takanon_id.

design_plan.name: תכנית עיצוב הטייסים
design_plan.notes: Single design plan that spans the boundary of TWO approved statutory plans. Both תב"עות are listed in linked_statutory_plans below; each תא שטח declares which one governs it via parcels[].governing_takanon_id. This is the canonical example for the many-to-many design-plan ↔ statutory-plan model — see CONTEXT.md → Architectural Decisions.

linked_statutory_plans.coverage_notes: Primary governing plan for the southern part of the design plan (16.5 dunams, 387 units). תקנון approved 2024-01-23. All parcels currently declared in project.parcels[] (plot_1/2/4/5/6/10) are governed by this plan.

Northern site (6.0 dunams, 220 units). Currently staged at data/staging/407-1048248/ — תקנון not yet acquired from mavat.gov.il. Once available, the parcels it governs will be added to project.parcels[] with governing_takanon_id = "407-1048248". See data/staging/407-1048248/STATUS.md.

meta.plan_name: התחדשות עירונית במתחם הטייסים, נס ציונה
meta.plan_name_en: Urban Renewal in the Pilots Complex, Ness Ziona
meta._format_rule_overrides_doc: All city-wide submission format rules apply to Hetzeisim. The project is residential-only — there is no commercial-specific chapter rule in the current rule set to skip (FORMAT_REQUIRED_CHAPTER_ENVELOPE is general envelope/facades, not commercial). Override list is empty.
meta.reference_design_plan: תכנית עיצוב הטייסים 23.3 — Kika Braz Architects, 63 pages
meta.scope_out_reason: תאי שטח 3 ו-5 נמצאים בתחום תכנית 407-1109909 (אתר צפוני) שטרם אושרה. אינה ניתנת לבדיקת תאימות.
meta.total_site_area_sqm_note: Computed from תשריט (kavim kchulim.shp polygon area, EPSG:2039). Matches meta.total_site_area_dunam × 1000 = 16,580 m². Replaced earlier value 19516, which was inconsistent with the dunam figure — see reports/407-0977595/tashrit-analysis-2026-04-30.md.
meta.scope_in_note: All 6 parcels in this plan's תשריט (migrashim.shp) are inside the compliance scope. plot_5 (402.77 m², YEUD=882=שצ"פ variant) and plot_10 (207.38 m², YEUD=423=שביל) are residual parcels — present in the תשריט but not in the תקנון rights table on page 16. They have no building rights and no specific compliance rules; they are tracked for completeness.

building_rights.primary_notes: includes 50 sqm/building for resident amenities (other use = significant variance)

height.height_notes: floor count + roof level with mechanical enclosures and stairwell per §6.9
height.fourth_basement_note: 4th basement level permitted only to meet parking standards

setbacks.setback_notes: All setback lines per תשריט (DWG). No balcony protrusion beyond western building line toward plot 32.
setbacks.alternative_source_note: Could potentially be populated from the vector shapefiles in digital_files.tashrit (ITM polygons, EPSG:2039) instead of DWG layer extraction. Not yet populated — pending identification of the building-line layer (קו בניין). See digital_files.tashrit.todo_building_line_layer.

parking_standard.source_quote: החניה בתחום התכנית תהיה בהתאם לתקן החניה התקף בעת הוצאת היתר הבניה
parking_standard.fallback_standard: תקנות התכנון והבנייה (התקנת מקומות חניה) — המהדורה התקפה בעת הוצאת היתר
parking_standard.notes: Per תקנון §6.2.1 the parking ratio is fixed at permit time by the then-current national standard, not by the תב"ע itself. The numeric values are intentionally null here — content engine returns requires_review for CONTENT_PARKING_RATIO until the engineer pins the standard. National standard ratios vary by zone and apartment size and were not loaded from a verified source.

public_component.service_notes: 400 sqm of service area = covered courtyards for public building
public_component.public_use_note: Ground floor + floor 1 only. Includes daycare (מעונות יום). Max 750 sqm total.

parcels.notes: Landscape and stormwater only. No buildings.
parcels.plot_area_source: Computed from migrashim.shp polygon area (EPSG:2039, ITM). Not listed in תקנון rights table on page 16 (שצ"פ has no building rights).

parcels.notes: Small residual parcel inside the plan boundary. NOT mentioned by number in the תקנון. YEUD=882 places it in the שצ"פ family per MAVAT 800s range convention (see CONTEXT.md Open Tasks). No building rights and no compliance rules attached. Earlier scope_out framing as "northern site / plan 407-1109909" was wrong — that plan is the §77–78 notice for the adjacent plan 407-1048248, and plot_5 is well inside 407-0977595.

Not yet populated — pending identification of the building-line layer (קו בניין). See digital_files.tashrit.todo_building_line_layer.

The numeric values are intentionally null here — content engine returns requires_review for CONTENT_PARKING_RATIO until the engineer pins the standard. National standard ratios vary by zone and apartment size and were not loaded from a verified source.

parcels.notes: Pedestrian path created by §2.2 of the תקנון: "שינוי יעוד קרקע מדרך לשביל ולמבנים ומוסדות ציבור". Not in the rights table on page 16 — שביל has no building rights. No compliance rules attached.

compliance_rules.description: Maximum 235 housing units in plot 1
compliance_rules.source_quote: מספר יחידות הדיור המרבי במגרש 1 הינו 235 יח"ד

compliance_rules.description: Maximum 152 housing units in plot 2
compliance_rules.source_quote: מספר יחידות הדיור המרבי במגרש 2 הינו 152 יח"ד

compliance_rules.description: Maximum building height 50m above entry level in plot 1
Maximum building height 43m above entry level in plot 2
Maximum 9 floors for buildings facing רח' הטייסים
Absolute ceiling — no structure may exceed 91m above sea level. No variances permitted.
Public uses (ground floor + floor 1) max 750 sqm including daycare. מעונות יום counts toward this limit.
Minimum 50 sqm resident amenities per building on average
מרתף footprint ≤85% of plot area. Can exceed only with full stormwater compliance per §6.4.
2 separate basement entrances required. One may be shared with plot 6.
≥15% of total plan area must be permeable surfaces (no basement beneath)
≤50% of שצ"פ area may be hard-paved
Daily stormwater retention ≥510 m³ for plot 1
Daily stormwater retention ≥340 m³ for plot 2
Daily stormwater retention ≥280 m³ for שצ"פ (plot 4)
Daily stormwater retention ≥220 m³ for public building plot 6
Up to 10% of building area or units may be transferred between residential plots. No additional floors from transfer.
Minimum 9m gap between any two buildings including balconies. Measure envelope-to-envelope.
compliance_rules.geometry_note: Use Shapely unary_union(footprint + balconies) then .distance(). Store nearest_points() as evidence.

compliance_rules.description: Top floor must be set back ≥3m from רח' הטייסים facade
Top floor must be set back ≥3m from שצ"פ boundary (plot 4)
Balconies must maintain ≥1m from plot boundary
Western building line of plot 1 toward plot 32 must be marked on plan. No balcony protrusion beyond this line.
רשות התעופה האזרחית (רת"א) approval required for any structure exceeding 40m above ground. Buildings 1B and 1C exceed this.
Hydraulic engineer's stormwater report required as pre-permit condition. Must be signed by licensed engineer.
Forest officer (פקיד יערות) approval of tree survey required before any demolition
Asbestos survey + Ministry of Environment approval for removal required before demolition
All buildings to be demolished must be marked on the site plan תשריט
תכנית בינוי ופיתוח must be submitted at 1:250 scale minimum. 1:500 or 1:750 is NOT acceptable.
compliance_rules.check_note: Extract scale from title block on site plan pages. Accepted values: '1:250' only.

compliance_rules.description: All parking must be underground. No surface parking permitted. Visitor spaces must not be assigned to specific units.
At least 20% of ALL units across the entire plan must be small apartments (≤80 sqm total area including balcony). Minimum 78 units.
Garden apartments are permitted at ground level but their gardens must NOT face רח' הטייסים

small_apartments.description: At least 20% of all units across the entire plan must be ≤80 sqm total area

transfer_between_plots.description: Up to 10% of building area or units may be transferred between residential plots. Cannot add floors.

pre_permit_condition.description: Full design and development plan at 1:250 scale required before any building permit. This is a pre-permit gate.

stormwater_total.description: Total 1,350 m³ daily retention across all plots. Redistribution between plots is permitted.

digital_files.xls_format_note: HTML-formatted table, not true XLS binary
digital_files.dwg_conversion_note: AC1018 requires libredwg or ODA converter. ezdxf reads DXF only.

takanon_pdf.pdf_production_date_note: מועד הפקה — PDF generation timestamp from מבא"ת. NOT the statutory approval date. Statutory approval date lives in meta.approval_date (2024-01-23).
takanon_pdf.description: Statutory תקנון for plan 407-0977595 (מתחם הטייסים). Anchor for all rule citations and evidence bundles. Used as (1) reference, (2) test fixture for the rule-extraction pipeline, (3) target for evidence_bundle.source_page references.
takanon_pdf.todo_verify_approval_date: Verify the real statutory approval date against mavat.gov.il and ילקוט פרסומים before it is used for any compliance-critical logic. Current meta.approval_date (2024-01-23) is unverified.

parcel_count_check.note: Schema currently models 4 parcels in compliance scope (1, 2, 4, 6). The תשריט carries 6 (also 3 and 5, northern site, scope_out). Match is on full plan inventory.

rendered_pdf.description: Human-readable rendered תשריט PDF (paired with the M.jpg/.jgw scan).

tashrit.shapefile_geometry_note: ESRI shapefiles encode parcel polygon geometry in vector form (ITM, EPSG:2039). This is a potential alternative source for populating parcels[].setbacks_per_tashrit fields without DWG layer extraction. NOT YET POPULATED — pending verification of which shapefile (if any) carries the building-line layer (קו בניין). migrashim.shp gives parcel boundaries; the building line may live in kavim kchulim.shp (currently the plan's blue line) or may be absent and must come from a DWG layer.
tashrit.todo_building_line_layer: Identify which shapefile carries קו בניין (building setback line). If none, this remains a DWG-only extraction (407-0977595_מצב מוצע.dwg). Setback values must be sourced from the building-line layer specifically, not the parcel boundary.

notes.northern_plan: This תב"ע covers only the southern part (387 units, plots 1,2,4,6). The full תכנית עיצוב submitted by Kika Braz (700 units, 23.2 dunams) spans a second plan — 407-1109909. That plan is NOT YET APPROVED. Do not include plots 3 and 5 in any compliance opinion.
notes.northern_plan_registry_note: UNRESOLVED: Perplexity flagged that the northern plan may have a different number and may have reached הפקדה stage in January 2025. Verify in mavat.gov.il before implementing any northern-site logic.
known_violations_in_reference_submission: WESTERN_LINE_PLOT_1 — western building line not marked on plan
takkanon_footnotes: (1) Primary area includes 50 sqm/building for resident amenities. Any other use = significant variance.
(2) Floor count in table + roof level with mechanical enclosures and stairwell exit per §6.9.
(3) 4th basement level permitted only to meet parking standards.
(4) Building setback lines per תשריט (DWG drawings).
(5) 400 sqm of service area serves the public building as covered courtyards.

parking_standard_source.source_quote: החניה בתחום התכנית תהיה בהתאם לתקן החניה התקף בעת הוצאת היתר הבניה
